message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantFontDecoration none
skinparam participantFontUnderline false
skinparam participantFontStrike false
skinparam participantFontItalic false
skinparam participantFontBold false
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantFontDecoration none
skinparam participantFontUnderline false
skinparam participantFontStrike false
skinparam participantFontItalic false
skinparam participantFontBold false

actor User
participant "Frontend" as Frontend
participant "API Gateway" as APIGateway
participant "Matching Service" as MatchingService {
    participant "Controller" as Controller
    participant "Service" as Service
}
participant "Matching Database" as MatchingDatabase {
    participant "Questions" as Questions
    participant "MatchRequests" as MatchRequests
}

User -> Frontend: PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
Frontend -> APIGateway: PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
APIGateway -> Controller: checkForMatch(requestId)
Controller -> Service: find user's MatchRequest with requestId
Service -> MatchRequests: user's MatchRequest
MatchRequests -> Service: find another MatchRequest
Service -> MatchRequests: another MatchRequest
MatchRequests -> Service: get a random question
Service -> Questions: Question
Questions -> Service: create sessionInfo and attach to each MatchRequest
Service -> MatchRequests: update the 2 MatchRequests
MatchRequests -> Service: user's MatchRequest
Service -> Controller: 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
Controller -> APIGateway: 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
APIGateway -> Frontend: switch to session page
Frontend -> User: 

@enduml
